name: shanghai-rave-index
description: Interactive Shanghai Rave Index for 2026 techno and rave events.

scripts.posters:upload: npm run posters:prepare && npm run supabase:import
scripts.scrape: node scripts/scrape-events.js && node scripts/generate-seo-pages.js && npm run posters:prepare
scripts.check: node --check scripts/check.js && node --check scripts/site-structure.js && node --check scripts/site-components.js && node --check scripts/check-site-structure.js && node --check scripts/scrape-events.js && node --check scripts/audit-events.js && node --check scripts/generate-seo-pages.js && node --check scripts/generate-poster-archive.js && node --check scripts/optimize-posters.js && node --check scripts/apply-supabase-migrations.js && node --check scripts/import-supabase-data.js && node --check scripts/write-love-wall-config.js && node --check assets/poster-archive.js && node --check assets/account-system.js && node --check assets/ops-admin-gate.js && node --test tests/account-system.test.js && node scripts/check-site-structure.js && node scripts/check.js && node scripts/audit-events.js
scripts.supabase:install: npm run supabase:migrate && npm run supabase:import && npm run supabase:configure-client
